name: Ai Lao Mountain Jade Needle White Tea
description: Handpicked silver needles from high-altitude Ai Lao. Extraordinarily gentle — meadow flowers and light honey.

name: Early Spring Sun-Dried Buds Wild Varietal
description: Sun-dried wild-tree buds processed in the white tea tradition. Grassy, camphor-tinged, and quietly complex.

name: 2025 Ikebana Mini
description: Bud-heavy Yunnan white tea — bright floral fragrance, sticky body, stone fruit sweetness, and excellent endurance for long sessions.

name: Imperial Grade Pure Bud Bi Luo Chun
description: The finest expression of this classic style — hand-rolled buds, sweet chestnut aroma, silky vegetal brightness.

name: Yunnan Green Spring Bi Luo Chun
description: Yunnan's take on the Bi Luo Chun tradition — bolder, earthier, with a stone fruit sweetness.

name: First Flush Mao Feng Yunnan Green Tea
description: Delicate hairy tips, light floral fragrance, and a clean sweet finish. An approachable everyday green.

name: Yunnan Pure Bud Silver Strands First Flush
description: Silvery buds, honeyed sweetness, gentle spring floral notes. Incredibly soft in the cup.

name: Menghai Buddha Aroma Green Tea
description: Rich, full-bodied for a green — grown in ancient Menghai forests, with a deep lingering sweetness.

name: Ganlu
description: Light and airy pre-Qingming green from Sichuan. Fluffy buds make a smooth, elegant soup with refreshing sweetness and a fruity, mouth-watering quality.

name: Mao Jian King
description: The finest Mao Jian from Guizhou — the tiniest of tiny buds. Elegant, thick, and subtle; an engaging experience.

name: Wild Huang
description: A bud-heavy early-picking yellow tea from Sichuan. The men huang step smooths out the sharpness for a thicker, smoother body with slight oxidation.

name: King of Duck Shit Aroma Dan Cong Oolong
description: A legendary Phoenix mountain oolong — its name belies a spectacular orchid, honey, and almond fragrance.

name: Premium AA Da Hong Pao Wu Yi Shan Rock Oolong
description: The famous 'Big Red Robe' — roasted, mineral, with a complex rocky character and warm finish.

name: Full House Dancong
description: Made from mantangxiang varietal — the name means 'full room fragrance'. Honey-soaked fruits layered with a wild funk, sweet and enduring.

name: Golden Duckshit Dancong
description: Deftly charcoal roasted dancong. Bright, delicate floral fragrances over a dense, layered soup full of sweetness and intrigue.

name: Peridot Tieguanyin
description: Light oxidation tieguanyin from Fujian. Bright green aromatics and buttery orchids atop a seaweed umami. A modern take on the iron goddess.

name: Kismet Tieguanyin
description: Light oxidation tieguanyin from Fujian. Sugary green with fragrances of clover and honeysuckle — a light, bright daily oolong.

name: Dahongpao
description: A yancha blend leaning heavily on the Meizhan varietal. Traditional processing with roast, mineral character and the balanced fragrances of classic rock oolong.

name: Winter Daphne
description: Wuyi Yancha made from the rare Ruixiang varietal. Minerality and a creamy body atop a floral character and sweetness that evolves throughout the session.

name: No.2 Rougui
description: One of white2tea's favourite yanchas. Four roasts recede to reveal dark fruits and deep mineral character. A cinnamon-varietal rock oolong best experienced on its own terms.

name: Imperial Mojiang Golden Bud Yunnan Black Tea
description: All-golden buds from Mojiang. Cocoa warmth, malt sweetness, velvety smooth with no astringency.

name: Feng Qing Wild Tree Purple Black Tea
description: From century-old wild purple-leaf trees. Fruity, muscatel, with an unusual grape-and-berry character.

name: Butterjam Red
description: Fujian black tea for the daily grind. Jammy stone fruit sweetness and uplifting hongcha aromatics — excels gongfu or tossed in a mug.

name: 2020 Waffles
description: A classic everyday shou — sweet, approachable, with a soft body and smooth warming character. Pressed in a waffle pattern for easy breaking.

name: 2018 Brown Sugar
description: Made from a large percentage of huangpian leaf. Light and comfortable daily drinker with a sweet core and woodier elements.

name: 2022 Gingerbread Man Minis
description: Packed full of sticky sweet molasses flavor and aroma. A great introductory shou for anyone with a penchant for sweet baked goods.

name: 2025 Lumber Slut Mini
description: Dense petrichor and wood — a ripe pu-erh focused on camphor and lower umber-toned tastes. Will benefit from aging.

name: 2022 Lumber Minis
description: Mini version of the classic Lumber Slut blend — petrichor, wood, and camphor notes. Drinks well now or ages gracefully.

name: 2024 5th Wave Mini
description: Small batch shou charcoal roasted by Wuyi Yancha makers. Thick-bodied, roasted, with a lingering bitterness — white2tea's answer to a coffee drinker's morning cup.

name: 2024 Jamrock Steady Minis
description: Aged sheng maocha pressed with light-ferment shou — a blend meant to mimic decades of age. Smooth body with the underlying complexity of aged raw pu-erh.

name: 2022 Boat Captain Minis
description: A smoked sheng — bold, tobacco-forward, with punchy power and a lingering wake of sweetness. Will benefit from aging.

name: 2024 Gas Minis
description: Focused on mind-bending bitterness. Flash steeps recommended — you'll understand why it's named Gas around steep five.

name: 2021 Coyote Minis
description: Hotline Space Coyote blend — strong Menghai character with a smoky backdrop and medium bitterness. Full-on power for intensity fiends.

name: 2022 941 Mini
description: Light and relaxing — sweet, soft, and easy with fresh sweet grass Yiwu character. Ideal for beginners or a casual morning cup.

name: 2023 La Sombra Mini
description: A multi-region blend walking the tightrope of fruity sweetness and savory undercurrent. Excellent daily workhorse for beginners and veterans alike.
